fields.description: Basic facial treatment for the face
A treatment to lighten the skin in the underarm area
This facial combines a Diamond Peel with a Collagen mask to help improve skin elasticity and firmness.
Features a Diamond Peel along with a Vitamin C serum and mask to brighten and even out skin tone.
A premium facial that includes a Diamond Peel and a specialized Casmara mask for targeted skin concerns.
An exfoliating treatment to remove dead skin cells and reveal smoother skin.
A treatment that uses radiofrequency energy to tighten skin and reduce the appearance of wrinkles, combined with a facial.
A treatment that infuses the skin with active ingredients for rejuvenation and brightening effects.
A comprehensive treatment combining a facial, radiofrequency, and infusion for enhanced oxygenation, skin tightening, and nourishment.
This treatment combines a facial, serum application, and Photodynamic therapy (PDT) light therapy to promote skin renewal.
Uses gentle electrical currents to enhance the absorption of serums into the skin, paired with a facial.
Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy combined with a facial and PDT light to stimulate collagen production and skin regeneration.
A laser treatment that uses a carbon mask to exfoliate, minimize pores, and improve skin texture.
A laser treatment designed to target and reduce the appearance of melasma and freckles.
Laser treatment to remove unwanted tattoos (price depends on size).
A treatment that infuses Vitamin C into the facial skin for a brighter complexion.
A treatment focused on lightening the skin on the back.
A treatment to lighten the skin on the chest area.
A treatment aimed at lightening the skin on the buttocks.
A treatment to lighten the skin on the neck.
A direct injection to reduce inflammation and size of individual pimples.
A comprehensive treatment involving a facial, anti-acne serum, and light therapy to combat acne.
Cavitation treatment to help slim and contour the face.
Cavitation treatment targeting fat reduction and contouring of the waist area.
Cavitation treatment aimed at slimming and contouring the thighs.
Cavitation treatment to help reduce fat and contour the arms.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) treatment for hair removal on the face.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal for the arms.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) Brazilian hair removal on the bikini area.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal for either the lower or upper legs.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) removal for the upper lip area.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal for the underarms.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal for the bikini line.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal for the chest area.
Intense Pulsed Light (IPL) hair removal for either the lower or upper back.
Treatment for removing warts (minimum price per area applies).
A treatment to curl and lift lashes, with an option for tinting.
A treatment to curl and lift lashes.
